title: Fig. 1 in Selenocysteine in Trypanosoma evansi: Identification of the Genes selb, selc, seld, pstk, seltryp and the Selenophosphate Synthetase Protein
author: Tavares, Kaio Cesar Simiano
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Detection of gene expression of the selenocysteine pathway in T. evansi. Numbers on the sides indicate molecular size in base pairs. Lanes marked as 1: Molecular-weight size marker (100bp lader Ludwig Biotecnologia- Brazil); Lanes marked as 2: PCR product. selD, selB and selTRYP amplicons ran in 1% agarose gels; selC and PSTK ran in 2% agarose gels. The gene amplified in each reaction is indicated on the bottom.
